summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 14→Jul 20 vs Jul 7→Jul 13* · Revenue +43% (1,398,442 vs 978,924 EGP) · Spend +24% · ROAS 6.36 (+16%).
   • CPC: 2.12 → 2.02 EGP (-5%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.02% → 0.88% (-14%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,145 → 1,458 EGP (+27%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 55%* of the move (helped, +300,167 EGP)  ·  *CVR 34%* of the move (hurt, -221,962 EGP)  ·  *CPC 11%* of the move (helped, +10,874 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +27%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *300,167 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +16%.
     Revenue +43% because spend +24%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *lblb strollers v1*, its AOV went 7273.33 EGP→1677.47 EGP on 1,566 EGP spend (~7% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 14→Jul 20 vs Jul 7→Jul 13* · Revenue +42% (218,678 vs 153,547 EGP) · Spend +51% · ROAS 3.91 (-6%).
   • CPC: 9.86 → 8.63 EGP (-12%, down (good))
   • CVR: 2.37% → 2.05% (-14%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,725 → 1,644 EGP (-5%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 44%* of the move (hurt, -34,116 EGP)  ·  *CPC 41%* of the move (helped, +7,977 EGP)  ·  *AOV 15%* of the move (hurt, -10,773 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -14%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-34,116 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -6%.
     Revenue +42% because spend +51%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255403883410011|NEW ARRIVALS NEW VIDEOW CUTSWIMWEAR BIRDNEST>, its CVR went 0.0%→4.09% on 6,621 EGP spend (~116% of the swing).
